title: Pickle Lighter
description: Changes flint and steel to the pickle lighter.
body:
From the viral hit video meme: PICKLE LIGHTER!!!! This resource pack changes the flint and steel item to the pickle lighter from the aformentioned hit video (sound included!!!). This modest yet exciting resource pack is the perfect addition to your repertoire.

PICKLE???
![Pickle Lighter in item form floating in trial chamber.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79d27196d21d6c148aa3add110d98b9ece69553c.png)
